title: elaphoglossum subsessile
intro: Elaphoglossum subsessile is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. It is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Elaphoglossum subsessile is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
